title: Recommendation: automate low-risk lab actions
summary: Briefing Genie can automate many lab actions if it keeps a human in the loop for major decisions.

claims.text: Drafting and summaries are acceptable automation candidates.
Teams were confused by a prior automated recommendation.
Users accept generated briefings when evidence is visible.

openQuestions: Which actions are low risk enough to automate?
recommendation: Automate routine lab actions and ask for approval only on major decisions.
